channel.title: Windows 10 on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in Windows 10 on linuxrepos

item.title: Should you switch from Windows 10 to Windows 11
item.description: The question isn’t if you should switch, but if you CAN switch. Windows 11 does a lot of things right as most of it’s systems are identical to 10. However, there are some drawbacks which we need to dive into.
